error_signature: uploaded sheet not appearing in Google Sheets trigger
title: Uploaded sheet not visible in Google Sheets trigger
symptom: The Google Sheets trigger does not display the uploaded sheet, showing unrelated files instead.
not_this_if: Sheet is already a Google Sheet and visible in the trigger
root_cause: The Google Sheets trigger may not recognize Excel files (XLSX) directly. It requires the file to be in Google Sheets format to display it correctly in the trigger options.
fix_steps: Convert the uploaded Excel file from XLSX to Google Sheets format
Refresh the Google Sheets trigger to see the updated list
agent_instruction: Convert the Excel file to Google Sheets format and refresh the trigger.
